name: Linuxcare, Inc.: Enterprise Service and Support for All Things Linux (Draft Profile)
description: Aberdeen Group profiles Linuxcare, Inc., a San Francisco-based firm providing enterprise Linux services, support, training, and certification. Founded in 1998, Linuxcare attracted KPCB as its first Linux-related investor and signed OEM contracts with Dell, IBM, and Sun for back-end Linux support across server and desktop product lines. Aberdeen concludes that Linux adoption is accelerating and that Linuxcare has proven its viability as the emerging Linux specialist services firm; several sections are marked as incomplete pending customer interviews. This is a DRAFT profile circulated before finalization.
